title: ochna inermis
intro: Ochna inermis, also known as the Mickey Mouse plant, is a small tree or shrub native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help treat various health issues such as fever, headache, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ochna inermis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
